plugins.name: behavior-driven-testing
plugins.description: Guides writing of behavior-driven Go unit tests that prioritize testing meaningful behaviors over chasing code coverage

plugins.name: worklog
plugins.description: Populate worklog from GitHub PR activity and generate biweekly status reports with JIRA updates

plugins.name: quarterly-connection
plugins.description: Generate Red Hat quarterly connection self-evaluations by analyzing worklog data, Jira tickets, GitHub PRs, and code reviews

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Search, create, and manage notes in the Obsidian vault

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Grilling session that challenges plans against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation (CONTEXT.md, ADRs) inline

plugins.name: jira-pointer
plugins.description: Assign story points to Jira issues using the GCP HCP pointing rubric, recursively traversing feature/epic hierarchies
